column1: # Cassiopeia A Flux Monitoring Time Series
# San Jose CA — Observer: Steve Hawker
# Reference flux at 1420 MHz: 2723 Jy (epoch J2000
# Expected flux at 2026.0: ~2567 Jy (apply correction: F = F0 * (1 - 0.0077)^(year-2000))
# session_id      — links to session log file
# equip_version   — equipment log version in effect

# tsys_derived_K  — system temperature derived from this observation (K)
# sefd_derived_Jy — SEFD derived from this observation (Jy)
# (entries to be added after each Cas A observation)
